question: What is data transmission?
options: The process of storing data permanently
The process of sending data from one device to another
The process of deleting data from memory

question: What is parallel transmission?
options: Bits are sent one at a time over one wire
Data flows in one direction only
Multiple bits are sent at the same time using multiple wires
Packets are sent independently across a network

question: What is serial transmission?
options: Bits are sent one at a time over a single wire
Multiple bits are sent at once over multiple wires
Data flows both ways at the same time

question: Which is an advantage of parallel transmission?
options: Can be faster over short distances

question: Which is a disadvantage of parallel transmission?
What is skew?
options: When bits arrive at different times
When wires interfere with each other
When data is sent both ways

question: Which is an advantage of serial transmission?
options: Can only be used inside a computer

question: Which is a disadvantage of serial transmission?
options: Can be slower over very short distances

question: Which transmission method is commonly used for buses connecting RAM and CPU?
What is simplex transmission?
options: Data flows both ways at the same time
Data flows in one direction only
Multiple bits are sent at once
Data flows both ways but not at the same time

question: Which is an example of simplex transmission?
options: Keyboard sending data to a computer

question: What is half-duplex transmission?
options: Data flows in one direction only
Data flows both ways at the same time
Data flows both ways, but not at the same time
Bits are sent one at a time

question: Which is an example of half-duplex transmission?
What is full-duplex transmission?
options: Data flows both ways at the same time
Data flows in one direction only
Bits are sent one at a time

question: Which is an example of full-duplex transmission?
What does USB stand for?
What type of transmission does USB use?
Which is an advantage of USB?
What does hot-swappable mean?
options: The cable gets hot during use
The device can be connected or removed without restarting
The cable can only be used once

question: Which is a disadvantage of USB?
